description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a sprawling, geometric layout. The structure features large glass windows, open terraces, and a mix of white and gray exterior surfaces, complemented by green landscaping and palm trees. The property is bordered by a tall, dark privacy wall and includes a driveway leading to a covered parking area. Outdoor spaces include a pool, patio, and several seating areas, with the main entrance accessible from a paved walkway. The house is designed with clean lines, minimal ornamentation, and an emphasis on indoor-outdoor living. The surrounding environment includes a road lined with palm trees, enhancing the contemporary, upscale aesthetic.
description: A modern, flat-roofed single-story house with large windows, open terraces, and a geometric layout, surrounded by palm trees and a privacy wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, covered parking, and a row of palm trees along the road.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, pool area, and extensive terrace space, with the privacy wall enclosing the property.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the house's geometric structure, open patio, and the road with palm trees.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the driveway, parking area, and the landscaped front yard with palm trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a minimalist door, paved walkway, and no visible porch or columns, emphasizing clean lines and openness.
